SOC2.CC6.1: Access control and role-based authorization enforced via SecurityContext middleware.
SOC2.CC7.2: Security audit logging is mandatory via audited wrappers and decorators.
SOC2.CC8.1: Change management includes CI validation and benchmark regression checks.

GDPR.Art5(1)(c): Data minimization required in protocol payload schemas and storage paths.
GDPR.Art15: Audit trail export supports access reporting for data subject requests.
GDPR.Art17: Data retention and deletion procedures are documented and testable.

HIPAA.164.312(a)(1): Role-based authorization checks for read/write/import operations.
HIPAA.164.312(b): Audit controls implemented with structured audit log events.
HIPAA.164.312(c)(1): Integrity checks include signed artifact hash verification requirements.
